title: crotalaria semperflorens
intro: Crotalaria semperflorens, also known as the ever-flowering crotalaria or yellow rattle, is a flowering plant in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria semperflorens include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or infusion and consumed as a tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
